_comment: Synthetic Electron/VS-Code-family (Cursor) scene. Monaco exposes a sentinel string ('The editor is not accessible…') as the focused text area's label/value and a lone '/' as the viewport instead of the real buffer — the exact shape captured from a real Cursor window. The distiller must drop the sentinel + junk viewport and degrade to an honest app+window+role summary (the window title still names the file), never feeding the model the sentinel or a phantom 'Viewing:'.

elements.label: The editor is not accessible at this time. To enable screen reader optimized mode, use Shift+Option+F1
elements.value: The editor is not accessible at this time. To enable screen reader optimized mode, use Shift+Option+F1

focusedContent.label: The editor is not accessible at this time. To enable screen reader optimized mode, use Shift+Option+F1
focusedContent.value: The editor is not accessible at this time. To enable screen reader optimized mode, use Shift+Option+F1
